CIML Meeting2021October 19, 2021

Virtual Meeting

ItemTitleOutcome
a56th MeetingDiscussed
b18, 19 and 22 October 2021Discussed

12Preparation of the 16th ConferenceDiscussed

OIML

International Organization of Legal Metrology

Legal metrology — the practice and science of measurement that affects trade, health, safety, and the environment.
